goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'efes restaurant'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '7 people' at '19:30' on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 14:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'birmingham new street' and should be on 'the same day as the restaurant booking'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a particular restaurant. Its name is called efes restaurant
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 7 people at 19:30 on sunday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 14:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from birmingham new street and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
